mapper.insert: INSERT INTO feedback (user_id, recommend_id, music_id, parent_id, type, content) VALUES (#{userId}, #{recommendId}, #{musicId}, #{parentId}, #{type}, #{content})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM feedback f INNER JOIN music m ON f.music_id = m.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.type = 'FAVORITE'
AND (m.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.artist LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.album LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM feedback f LEFT JOIN user u ON f.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN music m ON f.music_id = m.id WHERE f.type = 'COMMENT' AND (f.parent_id IS NULL OR f.parent_id = 0) AND f.music_id IS NOT NULL
AND (f.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.artist LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM feedback WHERE music_id = #{musicId} AND type = 'COMMENT'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM feedback WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND music_id = #{musicId} AND type = 'LIKE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM feedback WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND music_id = #{musicId} AND type = 'FAVORITE'
SELECT * FROM feedback WHERE id = #{id}
